actions.narration_phrase: Suggested Tasks lists fresh work you can claim — five cards waiting on your call right now.
Click Pick Up on any card to claim it instantly — size, priority and deadline shown.
Your Coordinator Queue shows nine items needing triage decisions before they reach the design team.
Review Submissions holds five drafts already waiting on your approval before work moves forward downstream.
The status strip surfaces approved, on hold, and active counts so you spot bottlenecks fast.
Team Board and Block Health track who is loaded right now.
From here you triage, unblock, and keep flowing.

narration.text: Welcome to your Coordinator dashboard. Suggested Tasks lists fresh work you can claim — five cards waiting on your call right now. Click Pick Up on any card to claim it instantly — size, priority and deadline shown. Your Coordinator Queue shows nine items needing triage decisions before they reach the design team. Review Submissions holds five drafts already waiting on your approval before work moves forward downstream. The status strip surfaces approved, on hold, and active counts so you spot bottlenecks fast. Team Board and Block Health track who is loaded right now. From here you triage, unblock, and keep flowing.
